title: Terraced Vineyard: Drip-Emitter Placement
strategies: top-block pile-up baseline: drop the K emitters on the K plots with the largest surrounding block deficit, ignoring overlap; on a clustered vineyard they crowd the hottest zone and reproduce the evaluator's weak reference (~0.1)
marginal-gain greedy maximum coverage: place emitters one at a time on the plot that adds the most currently-uncovered deficit, which spreads emitters across separate hot zones and beats the pile-up

greedy + relocation local search: pull each emitter out and best-respond it to the plot adding the most uncovered deficit given the others, climbing past greedy toward a locally optimal spread under a fixed pass budget
seeded metaheuristics: swap/relocate multiple emitters at once or perturb-and-reoptimize restarts to escape the local optimum a single-move search settles into
